She wears a simplified, oversized outfit in matching teal fabric that drapes loosely over her small frame. Her expression is a fixed, sweet smile with wide, dark eyes looking directly forward. In her hands, she holds a frosted cake with smooth white icing and a single red cherry on top. The cake is proportionally large, filling the space between her knees. Her pose is relaxed, one leg slightly bent as if mid-step. Soft overhead light casts a gentle shadow beneath the cake. The background is simple and uncluttered to keep focus on her. Rendered in the distinct, rounded style of chibi (shimon).
